# mtncloud_monitoring_alert (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud monitoring alert by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_monitoring_alert" "page_oncall" {
  name = "page-on-call"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the alert to look up.

### Read-Only

- `all_checks` (Boolean) Whether the alert applies to all checks.
- `app_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of monitor apps this alert watches.
- `check_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of checks this alert watches.
- `contact_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of the contacts notified by this alert.
- `group_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of check groups this alert watches.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the alert.
- `min_severity` (String) Minimum severity that triggers the alert.
